query:
SELECT 
  'Total com dteTermination NOT NULL' as tipo, COUNT(*) as quantidade
FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' 
AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total com dteTermination NULL', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' 
AND dteTermination IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total geral (sale)', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties 
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale'
